overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The character proceeds along a busy commercial sidewalk lined with towering digital billboards and futuristic architecture, then turns left at an intersection to cross the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past digital billboards and street traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane street
pedestrian in distinctive clothing walking ahead of ego character

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement displaying COLA branding with a figure wearing sunglasses
towering skyscrapers covered in colorful digital advertisements and neon signage
overhead highway structure with glowing trim spanning across the street
metal safety barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the lower level
steam rising from a vent in the street creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bustling Night City street at night, with the camera following the player character from behind as they walk along a concrete sidewalk. To the right, a massive COLA digital billboard dominates the view, while futuristic skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements line the left side. Vehicles drive along the multi-lane road to the left, and steam rises from a street vent ahead, creating a classic cyberpunk atmosphere.

events.description: ego character slows slightly while navigating through denser pedestrian traffic near the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the intersection while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a red cap walking alongside the ego character
black futuristic car approaching the intersection

entered.detail: illuminated blue signage reading FOURTH WALL on the building facade
zebra crossing lines marking the pedestrian crossing area ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the intersection, the COLA billboard passes out of view behind them. The FOURTH WALL neon sign becomes visible on the left building, and the crosswalk lines appear in the distance. Pedestrian density increases slightly as the character nears the corner, and the steam vent becomes more prominent in the center of the view.

events.description: ego character turns left and steps onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
flying AV vehicle passes overhead between the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: flying AV vehicle passing overhead between the tall buildings

entered.detail: futuristic aerial vehicle flying between the skyscrapers above the intersection
illuminated traffic light fixture at the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character executes a left turn at the intersection, stepping onto the asphalt crosswalk. The perspective shifts to show the crossing pedestrians and the FOURTH WALL sign now much closer on the left. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the towers, and the traffic light is visible at the corner. The steam vent and previous billboard are now behind the character as they navigate the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched commercial district that transitions from a linear sidewalk stroll to a crossing of a busy urban intersection. It begins behind the player character as they walk along a concrete path, flanked by a massive COLA digital billboard and towering skyscrapers draped in glowing advertisements. As the character advances, the billboard recedes and the view shifts toward a prominent FOURTH WALL neon sign and a rising plume of steam from a street vent. The scene then opens up at the corner where the character executes a left turn, stepping onto the asphalt crosswalk amidst a crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a flying vehicle gliding between the towers above as the character navigates the intersection under the glow of the traffic lights.
